title: Slough of Despond
subtitle: When guilt sinks and pride refuses the hand
subtitle_zh: 罪疚使人下沉，骄傲拒绝伸来的手
intro: The path disappears beneath cold mire, and every frightened thought grows heavier than the last.
Here the burden tells you to thrash, hide, blame, and sink. Pride calls that strength; despair calls it truth.
Promise stones stand in the fog, and Help is already reaching down. The question is not whether grace is near, but whether you will take its hand.
intro_zh: 地面开始下陷，重担把每一步都拉得更沉。
绝望说这就是你真实的样子；应许却在泥中仍然发声。
你不能靠自救离开这里。谦卑会伸手，恩典会抓住。
spiritual_theme_zh: 在绝望中承认需要，并抓住应许与帮助
core_mechanic: Mud raises despair and slows every step; promise stones give footing, Pliable turns back, and Help pulls the humble out.
core_mechanic_zh: 在泥潭中寻找应许石与安全落脚处，并接受援手。

design.provenance: Attachment Ch2 沮丧泥潭 (Skill 16). Added a half-sunken chapel-cross landmark this pass.

seven_beats.arrival: A cold mire under low fog; the mud drags at every step and floating words — guilt, fear, shame — drift on the slime.
seven_beats.orientation: Promise-stones give footing; across the bog a half-sunken chapel still lifts its cross above the muck.
seven_beats.encounter: Pliable sinks, despairs and turns back to the city; Help comes for the one who cries out.
seven_beats.temptation: Despair pressing you to give up and go back — the heavier the burden, the deeper you sink.
seven_beats.choice: Press on by the stones / cry out for Help / consider returning to the city.
seven_beats.consequence: Crying for help lowers despair and lifts humble hope; turning back deepens despair and shame.
seven_beats.grace: Help lifts the humble out of the mire and sets the feet toward the narrow gate.

chapel.verse_en: Out of the depths I cry to you, O LORD.
chapel.hint_zh: 呼求帮助，不要独自陷在泥潭里。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 回去吧，你永远走不出这片泥。

repentance.at: cry for Help (the cry from the depths)

design.stat_arc_note: Despair spikes in the mud, then falls sharply when the humble cry for Help.
